title: TooManyOrigins
description: An addon to Origins loosely inspired by the original mod.
body:
### TooManyOrigins is no longer supported. You will not be getting any support if you want to use this mod. You're on your own if you want to use it, here be dragonborns, shoo! ![TooManyOrigins Banner](https://i.imgur.com/MErzMI9.png)
Also try Origins Minus and Golemancy!
--- # Dependencies |Fabric|Forge| |---|---| ||| --- # Information TooManyOrigins is an addon to the Origins mod that aims to expand the origin roster with origins loosely inspired by the base origins and other origins that I like. While they are only designed around themselves and the base mod's origins, they are designed to be playable in most Origins mod settings, feel free to mix and match with datapacks, addons, whatever. You are absolutely free to modify the origins of the mod to your heart's content. [Apugli](https://modrinth.com/mod/apugli) is extremely open to customization and almost everything is able to be modified by datapacks. It is available for both [Origins (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) (also compatible with Quilt), and it's unofficial Forge port, [Origins (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-forge). Any feedback or bug reports should be posted either inside my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/UBfEjsANNz) or on the [GitHub Issues Page](https://github.com/MerchantPug/toomanyorigins/issues). --- # Featuring FIVE new origins... --- ![Hare Origin Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MerchantPug/apugli-docs/1.20/docs/images/tmoHareBannerRework.png) ![Hiss-kin Origin Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MerchantPug/apugli-docs/1.20/docs/images/tmoHisskinBannerRework.png) ![Dragonborn Origin Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MerchantPug/apugli-docs/1.20/docs/images/tmoDragonbornBannerRework.png) ![Swarm Origin Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MerchantPug/apugli-docs/1.20/docs/images/tmoSwarmBannerRework.png) ![Withered Origin Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MerchantPug/apugli-docs/1.20/docs/images/tmoWitheredBannerRework.png) **More in depth Origin descriptions can be found through [this page](https://apugli.readthedocs.io/en/latest/misc/base_contents/origins/).** --- # Downloads Click on your respective modloader icon to be led to a download page that only contains files for your modloader. [![](https://i.imgur.com/WnDxu3k.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/toomanyorigins/versions?l=fabric&l=quilt&c=release)[![](https://i.imgur.com/qthc0Ne.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/toomanyorigins/versions?l=forge&l=neoforge&c=release) --- # I want the old content! To get the origin(s) as they were prior to 1.0.0, you are able to apply a datapack found on the world creation screen, by using /datapack or [here](https://github.com/MerchantPug/legacy-toomanyorigins-datapack).
